text: if your coffee doesnt cost $7 and have oat milk in it are you even alive
tea people are just coffee people who gave up. fight me
on my 3rd monster today. my heart is doing a drum solo
my water bottle has time markers on it. im behind by 4 hours. as usual
started a matcha phase. personality changes in 3 2 1
cold brew is not a personality trait but try telling that to my coworker
someone brought decaf to the meeting. i have never felt more betrayed
i only drink single origin pour over and yes i am exhausting to be around
tea is just leaf water and i say that with love
energy drink collection in my fridge looks like a neon art installation
stanley cup water bottle cost me $45. water still tastes like water tho
matcha latte turned my tongue green and my bank account red
cold brew in december. yes im cold. no i wont switch to hot. this is who i am
decaf espresso is like a screen door on a submarine. pointless
french press coffee is just bean soup and i will die on this hill
tea has entered the chat. coffee has muted tea. as it should be
4 redbulls deep and i can hear colors now
hydroflask with 47 stickers on it is my whole identity
matcha powder is just expensive green dust. change my mind
iced coffee in winter is a lifestyle choice and i choose violence
half caf is for cowards. pick a side
i judge people by their coffee order and i am not sorry
herbal tea at night makes me feel like a medieval healer
celsius energy drink has me believing im an athlete. im not. at all
emotional support water bottle never leaves my side
tried ceremonial grade matcha. tasted like lawn clippings. $40 lawn clippings
cold brew steeps for 18 hours and i still cant steep in patience for 5 minutes
switched to decaf and my personality filed for divorce
coffee snob phase started as a joke. now i own a gooseneck kettle. send help
british friend judged my tea making. said i committed a war crime. fair
bang energy drink name is aggressive for something sold at gas stations
got a water bottle that yells at me to drink. technology peaked here
matcha ice cream counts as matcha consumption right
nitro cold brew is just coffee that went to art school
decaf after 2pm is my doctor's rule that i break every single day
spent $300 on a coffee grinder. instant coffee drinkers are winning honestly
loose leaf tea is a lifestyle commitment i was not prepared for
three espresso shots and a prayer. thats my morning routine
brought my own water bottle to a restaurant. waiter was confused. i was hydrated
matcha whisking at 6am like some kind of zen monk having a breakdown
cold brew concentrate is not meant to be drunk straight. learned that the hard way
bought decaf by accident. worst day of my entire life. not exaggerating
aeropress people are the crossfit of coffee. they will tell you about it
english breakfast tea is the honda civic of teas. reliable. boring. fine
pre workout energy drink turned me into a vibrating mess for 4 hours
my water intake is 90% coffee and 10% spite
matcha phase lasted 2 weeks. back to coffee. the prodigal bean returns
cold brew in a wine glass because im classy and unhinged
decaf is just coffee cosplay and you know it
i have opinions about water temperature for tea and zero friends because of it
chai latte people are just undecided between tea and coffee
monster ultra zero tastes like tv static and i love it
refilling water bottle is my cardio for the day
tried mushroom coffee. it tasted like a forest floor. not in a good way
cold brew cold brew cold brew. sorry i dont have other interests
caffeine free lifestyle lasted 36 hours. i saw god. went back to coffee
v60 pourover takes 4 minutes. explaining it to people takes 40
sweet tea is just diabetes in a mason jar. delicious diabetes
energy drinks before noon should be normalized not judged
nalgene bottle survived a fall off a cliff. i cant survive monday without it
matcha tastes like grass but make it aesthetic
iced americano year round. seasonal drinks are for the weak
decaf at a coffee shop feels like ordering water at a bar
spent more on coffee beans this month than groceries. beans ARE groceries right
yorkshire tea people are a cult and im here for it
five hour energy lasts 2 hours max. false advertising. gonna sue
my water bottle has its own seat in the car. priorities
oat milk matcha latte is $8 and i get one daily. dont do the yearly math
cold brew snob: actually the ratio should be 1:5 not 1:4. me: its bean water bro
switched to decaf. woke up at work. at my desk. drooling. back to regular
chemex coffee maker looks like a science experiment and i feel smart using it
my tea collection takes up more space than my spice rack. no regrets
drank a bang energy at 9pm. currently reorganizing my entire apartment at 3am
water sommelier is a real job apparently. i have found my calling
matcha kit cost $120. ive used it twice. its decorative now
cold brew keg in the office. we are all addicts. productivity is a lie
decaf espresso martini is an oxymoron and a cry for help
latte art barista drew a heart. fell in love. moved on. ordered again
green tea claims to be healthy. i claim to be productive. we're both lying
ghost energy drink has 0 sugar and 200mg caffeine. im a ghost now fr
insulated water bottle keeps water cold for 24 hrs. i refill every 3 days tho
pumpkin spice latte season is the purge but for coffee gatekeepers
cold brew on an empty stomach was a choice. a violent regrettable choice
decaf drinkers have trust issues. how can you trust something with no caffeine
moka pot espresso at home saved me $2000/yr. cost me my sanity tho
kombucha is just tea that went to burning man
redbull gives you wings. it gave me heart palpitations. close enough
camelbak water bottle bit me. those straw things are aggressive
went from folgers to specialty beans. my wallet misses the ignorance
cold brew concentrate in a shot glass. corporate espionage fuel
my blood type is caffeine positive
bought an ember mug to keep coffee hot. forgot about it. drank it cold anyway
earl grey with bergamot is fancy words for 'i peaked in college'
energy drink tier list is the hill i will absolutely die on

cortado people just want you to ask what a cortado is
cold brew ice cubes so your coffee doesnt get watered down. yeah im that person now
instant coffee deserves respect. not from me. but from someone
caffeine withdrawal headache is proof that coffee owns me
